goal_text:
You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants.
You are looking for a 'restaurant'. The restaurant should be in the 'west' and should be in the 'expensive' price range.
The restaurant should serve 'scottish' food.
If there is no such restaurant, how about one that serves 'british' food.
Make sure you get 'phone number' and 'address'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should leave on 'saturday' and should depart from 'cambridge'.
The train should 'arrive by 13:00' and should go to 'london liverpool street'.
Make sure you get 'price' and 'departure time'.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants
You are looking for a restaurant. The restaurant should be in the west and should be in the expensive price range
The restaurant should serve scottish food
If there is no such restaurant, how about one that serves british food
Make sure you get phone number and address
You are also looking for a train. The train should leave on saturday and should depart from cambridge
The train should arrive by 13:00 and should go to london liverpool street
Make sure you get price and departure time
